creator: d_petrov@rus-telecom.ru
text:
We have Hyper-V on Windows server 2012 R2, where was deployed several hosts with FreeBSD. That is used as the gateway, VPN server, web server, and other. We don't use the legacy network adapter.
On all machines with a certain periodicity  network interfaces are stopping with error "no buffer space are available".
Helps only ifconfig down/up.
